moreAboutCandies.title:
Want to know more
about candies?

faqs.question: How many candies can you eat?
faqs.answer:
From half a candy per day, for example during a course. Up to a few pieces, for improving mood, reducing anxiety, and improving sleep.

Although CBD is safe, we still recommend no more than 3 candies per day.

faqs.question: Is it legal?
faqs.answer:
Yes. In 2021, the government allowed the import of cannabidiol (CBD) isolate into Ukraine.

Since CBD has no psychoactive (narcotic) effects, it was removed from the list of prohibited substances.

faqs.question: Is it safe?
faqs.answer:
Yes. This is confirmed by research results in many countries.

Although no side effects have been found from using CBD, it is recommended to consult a doctor, especially if you have medical conditions or are taking other medications.

faqs.question: When is the best time to take CBD?
faqs.answer:
For better sleep — 30 minutes before bedtime.
At the end of the workday to relieve stress and tension.
Take in courses to balance your internal state.
To reduce anxiety and panic attacks.
For relaxation during massages, tattooing, etc.

faqs.question: When is it better not to use?
faqs.answer:
We recommend consulting a doctor regarding the use of CBD, especially if:

• you are pregnant or breastfeeding
• before surgery (CBD may affect blood clotting)
• you have medical conditions or are taking other medications

CBD relaxes and reduces focus, so it is not recommended to use it before driving or working on tasks that require concentration.

meta.title: CBD Rabbit
meta.description: CBD Rabbit - is a store of delicious candies based on natural hemp

whatIs.title: 🧠 What is CBD?
paragraphs: CBD (cannabidiol) is a natural compound derived from the Cannabis sativa plant. Unlike THC, it does not produce a psychoactive effect and does not make you feel high or euphoric.
CBD interacts with the body's endocannabinoid system (ECS), a network of receptors involved in regulating mood, sleep, pain, and immunity.

howItWorks.title: 🌿 How does it work?
paragraphs: CBD does not bind directly to CB1/CB2 receptors the way THC does. Instead, it supports the body's natural balance-regulation pathways, enhances the action of endogenous cannabinoids, and interacts with other systems such as serotonin receptors.

benefits.title: ✅ Possible effects and benefits
benefits.intro: Scientific evidence points to the following potential effects
benefits.note: (some findings are still preliminary and require further research)

items.title: ✨ Reduced anxiety and stress
items.description: CBD may affect serotonin receptors, which is associated with lower anxiety levels.

items.title: ✨ Better sleep
items.description: Some studies suggest that CBD may help people fall asleep more easily and reduce nighttime awakenings.

items.title: ✨ Pain relief and anti-inflammatory action
items.description: CBD may modulate pain signaling and influence inflammatory responses.

items.title: ✨ Support in epilepsy treatment
items.description: CBD is the basis of Epidiolex, a medication approved for certain forms of epilepsy.

safety.title: ⚠️ What to know about safety
safety.intro: CBD is generally considered well tolerated, but it is important to remember:
items: 🔸 it may interact with other medications such as anticoagulants or antidepressants and alter their effects;
🔸 possible side effects include dry mouth, drowsiness, appetite changes, and nausea;
🔸 very high doses may affect liver markers, especially when taken together with certain medications.
safety.outro: CBD is not a universal cure, and its full effectiveness is still being studied.

compare.title: 🧪 The difference between CBD and THC
compare.cbd: CBD is non-psychoactive, does not create a high, and is widely used in wellness products.
compare.thc: THC is the psychoactive component of cannabis that produces euphoric effects.

items.label: 🔗 Harvard Health: Cannabidiol — what we know and what we still don't know
🔗 NCBI / StatPearls: CBD in clinical practice — benefits and risks
🔗 Forbes Health: Scientific evidence behind CBD benefits
🔗 AP News — More people are using CBD products
🔗 Zelena Hazeta — What CBD is and how it works

story.title: About the brand. How it all started
paragraphs: The idea for CBD Rabbit came at the beginning of the full-scale war in 2022. At that time, I was looking for a CBD format that felt comfortable for me, and I quickly realized that oil was not the right fit because of its bitter taste, the mouthfeel, and the unclear dosing.
The first step was researching the European market. I found CBD chocolate, but in most cases the dosage was minimal, around 10 mg per 100 g bar. For my needs, that was simply not enough.

Taking the Ukrainian context into account, I decided to go a different way and create a clearly noticeable format within a single candy. That is how we became the first to make a candy with 50 mg of CBD. Later, other brands began to use this approach too, and today some already work with even higher dosages.

At the start, I had no technological base. The first experiments were very simple: I was literally mixing CBD oil with chocolate. The result was interesting, so I began testing the product on friends.
Many of them do not consume meat or animal-derived products, so it was important for me to create sweets without ingredients of animal origin.
During the following year, I experimented with technologies and ingredients, while also shaping the brand and learning how to launch production properly and legally.
By the end of May 2023, Cod Rabbit candies first appeared in friends' venues in Kyiv — Tea Army and Karma Bar.
story.author: — Oleh Rodiuk, founder

rabbits.title: Why rabbits
paragraphs: I love rabbits and believe they are my totem animal.
They are incredibly interesting: unique-looking, tactical, energetic, fertile, and although they are not predators, they can still fight back even against a wolf.
So for me, the question "why rabbits?" never really existed.
What was much more interesting was how to combine that image with cannabis in a way that felt appropriate, light, and free of clichés.
You can see the result in the logo and the box design.
rabbits.author: — Oleh Rodiuk, founder

items.title: Ingredient quality
paragraphs: We work only with real, understandable ingredients.
Natural cocoa butter, freeze-dried fruits without additives, premium-grade matcha — everything we use matters not only in taste but also in origin.

We deliberately avoid artificial colorings, sweeteners, and cheap substitutes. Yes, that sometimes means a less perfect color or appearance. But for us, what matters more is not how the product looks in a photo, but what it truly is. At the same time, we do strive for beauty, which is why we experiment a lot in the process of creating each candy.

items.title: Transparency and responsibility
paragraphs: We pay special attention to legality and transparency in production.
We have all the necessary documents and permits to work openly and responsibly.
For us, this is not a formality but part of our respect for both the product and the people.

items.title: The future Ukraine
paragraphs: We are building a brand we want to see in the future Ukraine — open, conscious, diverse, and humane.
We support Ukraine:
We pay taxes, donate, help the Armed Forces and volunteers, and we do it not as part of social media communication but as our social responsibility.
list: initiatives advocating for the legalization of medical cannabis use;
initiatives supporting ketamine and MDMA therapies for PTSD treatment.

items.title: Our goal
paragraphs: To be there for people in difficult times.
We live in a reality of constant tension, where keeping inner balance becomes harder and harder. Chronic fatigue, overload, and instability have become the background of everyday life.
We do not take on the role of saviors. But we want to create products that help people slow down, exhale, and reconnect with themselves through simple, understandable rituals.

items.title: Our mission
paragraphs: To develop CBD culture in Ukraine through thoughtful, high-quality, and flavorful formats that fit naturally into everyday life.

accordeon.title: Storage
accordeon.text: Store in a dry place from 4° to 20°C and relative air humidity no more than 75%. Shelf life: 10 months from the date of manufacture
